session.tool_result:
1→"""Add labels to a pull request with retry and comprehensive error handling. 2→ 3→Usage: 4→ erk exec add-pr-labels <PR_NUMBER> --labels label1 --labels label2 5→ 6→Output: 7→ JSON with {success, pr_number, added_labels, failed_labels, errors} 8→ 9→Exit Codes: 10→ 0: Complete (some or all labels added - check 'success' field in JSON) 11→ 1: Critical error (PR not found, auth issues, etc.) 12→""" 13→ 14→from __future__ import annotations 15→ 16→import json 17→from dataclasses import asdict 18→from typing import TYPE_CHECKING 19→ 20→import click 21→ 22→from erk_shared.context.helpers import require_github, require_repo_root, require_time 23→from erk_shared.gateway.github.label_ops import add_labels_resilient 24→from erk_shared.gateway.github.types import PRNotFound 25→ 26→if TYPE_CHECKING: 27→ from pathlib import Path 28→ 29→ 30→@click.command(name="add-pr-labels")
... [44 lines omitted] ...
45→ """Add labels to a PR with automatic retry on transient failures. 47→ Attempts to add each label with retry on transient errors (502, 503, etc). 61→ "error": f"PR #{pr_number} not found",
